controls.title: Understanding the needs and expectations of interested parties
controls.text: The organisation shall determine the interested parties relevant to the ISMS and their requirements relevant to information security.
controls.evidence_expectation: Stakeholder register; legal, regulatory, and contractual requirements list
controls.assessment_procedure: Review stakeholder register; verify requirements mapped to controls

controls.title: Actions to address risks and opportunities
controls.text: The organisation shall plan actions to address information security risks and opportunities and integrate these actions into its ISMS processes.
controls.evidence_expectation: Risk assessment methodology; risk register; risk treatment plan
controls.assessment_procedure: Review risk assessment process; verify risk register current; check treatment plan implemented

controls.title: Information security policies
controls.text: Information security policy and topic-specific policies shall be defined, approved by management, published, communicated and acknowledged by relevant personnel.
controls.evidence_expectation: Information security policy document; approval evidence; distribution/acknowledgement records
controls.assessment_procedure: Review policy content against ISO 27001 requirements; verify management approval and annual review

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.text: Information about technical vulnerabilities of information systems in use shall be obtained, the organisation's exposure to such vulnerabilities evaluated and appropriate measures taken.
controls.evidence_expectation: Vulnerability scan reports; patch management policy; remediation tracking records
controls.assessment_procedure: Review scan coverage; check remediation SLAs met; verify critical patches applied within SLA

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.text: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including management of cryptographic keys, shall be defined and implemented.
controls.evidence_expectation: Cryptography policy; key management procedure; encryption implementation evidence
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify cryptographic standards used; check key rotation schedule; review key custody

controls.title: Access control policy
controls.text: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and other associated assets shall be established and implemented based on business and information security requirements.
controls.evidence_expectation: Access control policy; access request and approval records; periodic access review results
controls.assessment_procedure: Review access control policy completeness; sample access reviews; verify least-privilege applied
